title: Big Tech Is Buying Up Open Source... Vite Is Next
summary: Cloudflare acquired VoidZero, the company behind build tools Vite, Vitest, Rolldown, and Oxc. The video examines the broader trend of big tech acquiring open-source developer tooling and analyzes Cloudflare's strategic motivations, including integration with their platform and AI capabilities, while discussing potential consolidation concerns for the open-source ecosystem.
